reason:

If Anthropic + OpenRouter become unavailable simultaneously, the
system has below 50% structural readiness on fallback providers.

Per-provider readiness:
  ✗ deepseek     env=False socket_ok=None format_ok=None
  ✗ gemini       env=False socket_ok=None format_ok=None
  ✗ google       env=False socket_ok=None format_ok=None

  ✗ minimax      env=False socket_ok=None format_ok=None
  ✗ ollama       env=None socket_ok=False format_ok=None

Suggested actions:

  * Set the GROQ_API_KEY / GEMINI_API_KEY env vars if absent.
  * Re-run drill: `python -m app.resilience_drills run local_only`.
